args.query: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) as AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as total_sales FROM "Order" o INNER JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '')) WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1

exec_args.sql: SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) as AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) as total_sales FROM "Order" o INNER JOIN OrderItem oi ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id, '#', '')) = TRIM(REPLACE(oi.OrderId, '#', '')) WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId, '#', '')) ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1
